legal.privacy_intro: PingPong values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your choices.
legal.privacy_data_collected: We collect information you provide directly (account details, profile data), information collected automatically (usage data, device information, and cookies), and information from third parties when you choose to link them (e.g., social login).
legal.privacy_use: We use personal data to provide, maintain and improve the service (including multiplayer and chat), to communicate with you, to prevent abuse and fraud, and to comply with legal obligations.
legal.privacy_third_party: We employ third‑party service providers for authentication, analytics, hosting, and other features. Their use of data is governed by their own policies. We do not sell personal information.
legal.privacy_security: We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data, but no system can be guaranteed completely secure.
legal.privacy_children: The service is not directed to children under 13 and we do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13.
legal.privacy_retention: We retain personal data only as long as necessary to provide the service and to comply with legal obligations.
legal.privacy_contact: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at contact@pingpong.example.
legal.privacy_changes: We may update this Privacy Policy; any changes will be posted here with an updated date.
legal.terms_intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of PingPong. By accessing or using the service you agree to these terms.
legal.terms_user_rules: Users must behave respectfully: do not cheat, harass, exploit, or post illegal content. Violations may result in warnings, suspensions, or account termination.
legal.terms_account: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for all activity that occurs under your account.
legal.terms_ip: All code, visual assets, and trademarks are owned by the project or its licensors. You may not copy or redistribute proprietary assets without permission.
legal.terms_disclaimer: The service is provided for educational purposes on an 'as is' basis. To the maximum extent permitted by law, the project disclaims all warranties and is not liable for indirect or consequential damages.
legal.terms_governing_law: These terms are governed by the laws of the country where the project is developed.
legal.terms_changes: We may revise these Terms; any updates will be posted here and the 'Last updated' date will change.
legal.terms_contact: Questions about these Terms? Contact contact@pingpong.example.
